Register.title: Create New Account
Register.msgSuccess: Welcome to MWZ3! A verification email has been sent to your inbox.
Register.errExists: Email already registered, please login instead
Register.errElse: Something went wrong, please try again later.
Register.errPhone: Phone number must start with 01 for Egypt or 05 for UAE & KSA.
Register.errPass: Password must be at least 6 digits
Register.errName: Name cannot be less than 5 digits

Login.title: Login
Login.errPass: Password must be at least 6 digits
Login.errMismatch: please check your email / password and try again
Login.errUnactive: please activate your account with the email that was sent to your address
Login.txtEnterEmail: Please enter your email to send you a new activation link.
Login.msgActivateSent: activation link was sent to your address.
Login.errTokenExpired: Token have expired, please enter your email to send you a new activation link
Login.errTokenBad: Something is not right, please enter your email to send you a new activation link
Login.errActivateElse: Something went bad, please enter your email to send you a new activation link
Login.msgActivateSuccess: Your account have been successfully activated, you will be redirected to login page in 5sec
Login.EnterResetEmail: Please enter your email to send you a new Password-Reset link.

UserAds.title: Posted Ads
UserAds.msgSubmit: Ad will be sent to administration for review
UserAds.msgDone: Ad will be removed from public view and remain in your private page
UserAds.msgDelete: Sure ? This action cannot be undone
UserAds.msgEdit: Ad state will be reset to draft, then you can edit it and re-submit it to review and publish
UserAds.msgPublish: Ad will be publish to public viewers

UpdateUser.errPass: password should be 6 chars or more
UpdateUser.errName: Name must be at least 5 letters
UpdateUser.errPhone: Phone number must start with 01 for Egypt or 05 for UAE & KSA.
UpdateUser.errPhoneMinDigits: Phone must have at least 11 digits
UpdateUser.errPhonePrefix: Phone number musr be with correct format
UpdateUser.errPhoneLength: Phone must be 20 characters or less

UserProfile.title: Account Information
UserProfile.msgCountry: Please select your country of residence to continue

AdForm.errTitle: Length minimum of 10 and maximum of 250
AdForm.errDesc: Cannot be empty, maaximum length is 1000 chars
AdForm.errImage: Ad can have a maximum of 5 images

OrderConfirmation.confirmationMessage: We've received your order and are processing it now. You'll receive a confirmation email shortly with your order details.
OrderConfirmation.step1: We're preparing your order for shipment.
OrderConfirmation.step2: You'll receive updates on your order status via email.
OrderConfirmation.step3: Once your order is on its way, we'll send you tracking information.

comments.loginRequired: Please login to interact with comments.
